failedAssertions.reason: Fail: killing the live Codex subprocess did not stop the turn; it kept streaming and completed normally instead of ending cleanly as interrupted.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: no visible reasoning panel surfaced in the real TUI even with reasoning high and fast OFF, so the transient reasoning lifecycle could not be exercised.

Blocked: off-bottom keyboard scrolling and newer-activity indicators were observed, but a same-run return to live bottom with the indicator fully cleared was not conclusively captured before tuistory runtime limits.
Blocked: the real model would not yield a prose-free tool-only completion, so the tool-only transcript fallback path could not be directly exercised.
Blocked: the failure-path probe remained in thinking/waiting without surfacing a visible failed turn during the observed window.

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance to avoid explicit --company-id on the single-company local trusted TUI validator because it can leave chat turns stuck at Waiting for response; prefer auto-resolution for this surface.
